## Summary

- What changed?
- Why?

## Testing

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] `python -m ruff check .`
- [ ] Added or updated tests when behavior changed

## Privacy and release checks

- [ ] No private documents, local paths, credentials, or PII added
- [ ] Evidence-first language preserved where relevant
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
